CC3PO

Resources

You don't have to carry this alone.

If You Need Help Right Now

Call or Text 988

24/7 • Free • Confidential

Suicide & Crisis Lifeline

Text HOME to 741741

Crisis Text Line — Free, 24/7

Chat at 988lifeline.org/chat

Online chat — Free, 24/7

For Survivors

1in6.org

Support for male-identified survivors of sexual abuse. Online support groups, 1-on-1 chat, and resources.

1in6.org →

RAINN

Nation's largest anti-sexual violence organization. 24/7 hotline at 800-656-HOPE.

rainn.org →

National Suicide Prevention Lifeline

988 — Free, confidential support for people in suicidal crisis or emotional distress.

988lifeline.org →

For Men

ManTherapy.org

Mental health resources designed specifically for men. Humor, honesty, and real tools.

mantherapy.org →

HeadsUpGuys

Practical tips, self-check tools, and stories from men who've been through depression.

headsupguys.org →

For Parents

National Parent Helpline

1-855-427-2736 — Emotional support for parents in need.

nationalparenthelpline.org →

For the Central Valley

Stanislaus County Behavioral Health

Local crisis services and mental health support for Stanislaus County residents.

stanislausbhrs.org →

NAMI Merced County

National Alliance on Mental Illness — local chapter offering support groups and education.

nami.org →

Stay.

About Disclaimer Terms Privacy Policy AI Disclosure Crisis Protocol Crisis: 988

This site is intended for individuals 13 and older.

This space exists for people who almost gave up — and stayed.

LinkedIn X Instagram Facebook TikTok YouTube

Built with ♥ by CC3PO — AI-powered tools for real people

If you're in immediate distress or thinking about harming yourself, please reach out now.

Call or text 988 — 24/7 • Free • Confidential
